game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Subway Dash is an endless runner where you control a character dashing through train tracks. Dodge oncoming trains, jump over barriers, slide under obstacles, and collect coins to increase your score. The game gets progressively faster and more challenging the longer you survive. How far can you run before getting caught?
game_info.controls:
LEFT ARROW: Move to the left lane
RIGHT ARROW: Move to the right lane
UP ARROW: Jump over obstacles
DOWN ARROW: Slide under barriers
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart the game
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests the basic game functionality and responsiveness to inputs using a sticky keys approach that randomly changes actions.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Alternates between lane changes, jumps, and slides at semi-random intervals to ensure the game responds properly to all inputs.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game should run without errors, respond to all inputs correctly, and the character should navigate through obstacles for a reasonable period.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>
<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests that the game can be won by reaching a target high score through optimal play.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Prioritizes coin collection and obstacle avoidance using a predictive algorithm based on upcoming obstacle patterns.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The player should reach the winning score threshold (5000 points) without colliding with obstacles.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>
<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests the game's difficulty progression by playing through multiple speed increases.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Focuses on survival by making safe lane changes and avoiding obstacles while monitoring game speed increases.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game should gradually increase in difficulty with faster scrolling and more frequent obstacles as the player survives longer.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>
<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests collision detection accuracy with different types of obstacles.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Deliberately positions the character at the edges of obstacles to verify collision boundaries are working correctly.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Collisions should be detected accurately when the character touches obstacles, and near misses should be allowed to pass safely.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>
<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests the game's restart functionality after game over.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Plays until game over, then triggers restart to verify the game resets properly.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>After collision, the game should enter GAME_OVER_LOSE state and reset all game variables when restarted.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
